background.occupation: Delivery driver for a major food delivery app
background.social_class: Upper Middle Class (inherited family wealth from parents who own a successful small chain of restaurants, but chooses to work independently)
background.key_experience: During the 2020 pandemic, Chloe's delivery app algorithm suddenly slashed her pay rates without explanation while she was risking her health to deliver food. She tried to complain through the app's support system, which used automated responses and eventually ghosted her, leaving her feeling powerless and exploited by opaque tech systems.

dominant_traits: Very Low Openness to Experience (rigidly sticks to familiar routines and resists new ideas)
Very High Neuroticism (prone to anxiety and emotional volatility)
Low Agreeableness (easily irritated and dismissive of others' perspectives)

cognition.core_value: Transparency in technology - she believes all algorithms and corporate decisions affecting workers should be fully disclosed and explainable, no exceptions.
cognition.bias: Negativity bias - triggered by any news about tech companies or gig economy platforms, causing her to immediately assume the worst outcomes and ignore positive developments.

current_state.recent_memory: Last week, she read a viral Reddit post about a delivery app secretly testing a new AI system that could deactivate drivers based on customer complaints without human review.
